text.title: Vector DB Prod Setup — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Qdrant K8s StatefulSet with EBS gp3 + daily snapshot to S3.

example.title: prod-deploy.yaml for Qdrant 10M vectors prod
example.code:
deploy_mode: k8s-statefulset db_kind: qdrant image_tag: "qdrant/qdrant:v1.10.0"
storage: class: ebs-gp3 size_gb: 200 durable: true iops: 6000
resources: cpu_request: "2" cpu_limit: "4" memory_request_gb: 16 memory_limit_gb: 24
ha: strategy: single-with-snapshot # Qdrant OSS pattern replicas: 1
backup: schedule_cron: "0 3 * * *" retention_days: 30 destination: "s3://prod-backups/qdrant-snapshots/" last_restore_drill: "2026-04-15" drill_duration_min: 22
checklist: pre_deploy_passed: true post_deploy_passed: true monitoring_live: true security_config_applied: true smoke_search_ok: true
example.note: r1 durable EBS, r2 limits set, r3 Qdrant pattern (single + snapshot), r4 restore drilled within 60d, r5 both checklists green.
